name: Munich
industries: Automotive, industrial engineering, insurance and a deep technology sector give Munich Germany's richest project market.
intro: Munich pairs Germany's most valuable corporations with its highest salaries, and its project culture reflects the neighbourhood: BMW's vehicle programmes, Siemens's global engineering portfolios, Allianz's transformation agenda and a dense ring of technology suppliers. These organisations run delivery at international scale, which is precisely where PMP earns its keep — while Munich's software and automotive-software teams, including major US tech offices, hire on Scrum credentials. Certification pays for itself faster here than almost anywhere in Europe. We run live online cohorts throughout the year on Munich-friendly hours — weekend Saturday–Sunday batches and midweek Wednesday–Thursday batches both — meaning learners in Munich attend at ordinary local times, never overnight; the table below shows each upcoming date converted for Munich. We then guide your exam application, provide full-length mocks, and stay available for doubts until the certificate arrives.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Munich?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 10:00 AM – 07:00 PM GMT+2 in Munich. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Munich?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Munich. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Germany?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Germany and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Munich sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Germany accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Munich — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Munich: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
